ValidationRule.description: Prevent users who are not in the Advisory Council profile from editing Advisory Council Recommendation records once is past the "1-Ready for Review" Stage.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND(
NOT(OR( ISPICKVAL(ND_Stage__c, '1'), ISPICKVAL(ND_Stage__c, '')) ),
NOT(OR( $Profile.Name = "System Administrator", $Profile.Name = "Advisory Council", $User.ND_Bypass_Duplicate_Rules__c = TRUE) )
)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: This Advisory Council Recommendation has already moved out of the "1-Ready for Review" Stage. Please see a member of the Advisory Council team for any changes that need to be made.
